title: DRACO Corpus
description: Cross-Domain Benchmark for Deep Research — versioned corpus schema (ADR-037)

version.description: Corpus version. A DRACO score is only comparable across runs that share the same version.

id.description: Stable unique identifier, e.g. 'sci-001'. Never reused across versions.

domain.description: One of the five DRACO benchmark domains.

prompt.description: The research question exactly as posed to the harness.

must_cite.description: Keywords or phrase types that must appear as cited sources (e.g. 'peer-reviewed-journal', 'government-agency').

must_contain.description: Concepts, terms or perspectives the answer must address. Checked by regex + embedding similarity.

must_not.description: Failure patterns — if any are present, the answer fails the grounding check.

grader.description: How the rubric is evaluated. 'deterministic' uses only regex/embedding checks (offline safe). 'llm-judge' adds an independent model. 'hybrid' = both.
